Petition For Order Determining Validity Of Gift To A Person Described In Probate Code Section 21350 (A), 21351 (D)
Off Calendar Nov-10-2010 Continued To Nov-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The Clerk will contact Attorney Henry Glasser and advise him that the matter was continued to November 17, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

Off the record: The Probate Exmaniner informed the Court that she spoke to Mr. Glasser and that he requested a two week continuance. Therefore, the matter was continued to November 24, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
